overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world survival game showing a character walking through a sunlit forest trail. The character, equipped with a backpack and weapons, traverses from a narrow rocky passage into an open woodland area, eventually approaching power lines in the distance. The environment features dense pine forests with dynamic lighting filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest corridor with steep stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky passage with tall stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation forming the left wall of the narrow passage
large moss-covered rock formation forming the right wall of the narrow passage
dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees visible beyond the rocky corridor
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest floor
decaying log lying on the forest floor beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rocky corridor within a dense forest. Large moss-covered rock walls flank both sides of a dirt trail, creating an enclosed feeling. Tall pine trees are visible in the distance beyond the rocks, with sunlight filtering through the canopy. The character walks steadily forward through this confined natural passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with scattered undergrowth

events.description: exits the narrow rocky corridor into a more open forest area with wider path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail as the path widens and rock walls recede

entered.detail: tall grass and ferns lining the sides of the widened forest path
thick tree trunk with reddish bark standing prominently beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed rocky corridor to a more open forest trail. The rock walls fall away, revealing a wider dirt path surrounded by grassy undergrowth and scattered large tree trunks. The pine trees now frame the path on both sides rather than blocking the view ahead, creating a sense of expanding space as the character continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with utility infrastructure

events.description: power line tower becomes visible in the distance ahead through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking toward a power line structure visible ahead in the forest clearing

entered.detail: tall metal utility tower with crossbars carrying electrical lines, standing in the forest clearing
open grassy areas with wildflowers on both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide forest clearing where a power line tower becomes visible in the distance. The trail continues through an area with more open sky and scattered grassy clearings. The character approaches the utility structure as the forest density decreases slightly, with the power lines creating a vertical focal point against the backdrop of distant pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that transitions from a confined rocky passage into an expansive woodland clearing. It begins within a narrow corridor flanked by moss-covered rock walls, where sunlight filters through a high canopy of pine trees. As the character walks forward, the rock walls fall away to reveal a wider dirt path surrounded by grassy undergrowth and scattered tree trunks, creating a sense of expanding space. The scene then opens further into a wide forest clearing with a more open sky, where the density of the pines decreases. Finally, the camera tracks the character toward a distant power line tower that serves as a vertical focal point against the horizon.
